$schema: Features registry for terrain-gen-rust. Agents MUST NOT mark a feature 'passing' without cargo test --lib succeeding. Update 'last_verified' with date and seed when checking.

terrain_generation.description: Noise-based terrain pipeline (fBm -> erosion -> hydrology -> biomes -> soil -> resources)
known_issues: Terrain enum has 26 variants with 10+ match blocks — should use data-driven TerrainDef structs
features.json test_count was 25; actual grep count is 23 (terrain_gen.rs:6 + terrain_pipeline.rs:17)
terrain_pipeline.rs is 2232 lines — approaching split threshold
Desert biome dominant in 2/3 evaluation seeds (32–49%) with near-zero Forest (0.1–0.7%); biome distribution imbalanced post-WorldState refactor

Slope distribution is 98.4–98.7% flat across all 3 evaluation seeds (steep=0%, cliff=0%); elevation_std=0.09–0.11. Terrain is nearly uniformly flat, contradicting Pillar 1 ('Geography Shapes Everything') which requires hills, mountain passes, and varied topography to create strategic terrain. First measured 2026-04-30.

analytical_erosion.description: Stream Power Law (SPL) closed-form erosion: K * A^m * S^n
known_issues: src/analytical_erosion.rs not documented in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — omitted from file map (check #38 added 2026-05-08)

pipe_water.description: Pipe model water simulation (O'Brien 1995 / Stam GDC 2008), 8-directional flux with sediment transport
known_issues: Research prototype — volume conservation not extensively tested

simulation_water.description: Legacy WaterMap heightfield model — still runs for moisture but should be replaced by PipeWater
known_issues: THREE water systems exist (WaterMap, PipeWater, Terrain::Water) — should be ONE (PipeWater)
0D refactor (Stages 1-4) introduced WorldState.water (PipeWater) and unified rendering, but WaterMap still coexists in Game struct (game/mod.rs:396, 431). Cleanup not yet complete.

simulation_moisture.description: MoistureMap — reads from PipeWater + wind, feeds vegetation
known_issues: Moisture decay/persistence rules unclear
Chain: water_surface -> evaporation -> transport -> precipitation -> surface water -> vegetation moisture not fully connected
moisture.rs is 1867 lines — largest simulation module, candidate for split
9 of 18 tests are #[ignore] diagnostic tests — only 9 are regular passing tests

simulation_vegetation.description: VegetationMap — growth/decay based on moisture, soil, season

simulation_wind.description: WindField — Stam fluid solver + curl noise

simulation_scent.description: ScentMap — danger/home scent for creature AI

simulation_traffic.description: TrafficMap — tracks entity movement for auto-road building

simulation_soil_fertility.description: SoilFertilityMap — fertility based on soil type and conditions

known_issues: ExplorationMap reveals 100% of map trivially by tick 6000: initial reveal radius=15 (game/mod.rs:1369) + villager sight_range=22 covers a 70x25 map in ~200 ticks. Fog-of-war not functioning as a meaningful game mechanic — exploration_pct=100.0 in all evaluation seeds.

ecs_core.description: Entity-Component-System: components, AI, movement, hunger, death, farms, breeding, raids
known_issues: ecs/tests.rs is 7164 lines in one file — should be split into focused test modules

VillagerMemory is written (DangerZone, ThreatReport) in systems.rs but never read in ai.rs for decisions — Phase 2 (memory-driven AI) not started; AI still reads global stockpile counts (15 occurrences in ai.rs)

Simulation non-determinism: seed 777 population at tick 6000 varies between runs (8–13 observed across April 2026). On 2026-04-24 three sequential runs of the same binary yielded pop=8, 11, 11 (spanning 3 values in one session). On 2026-05-04 within-session divergence reached new extreme: seed 137 showed pop=4 (--diagnostics run) vs pop=11 (--report-card run, sequential); seed 777 showed pop=7 vs pop=13 in same pair. Root cause: rand::rng() in breeding/death path — replace with seeded per-entity RNG for reproducibility.
ecs/systems.rs is 2227 lines and ecs/ai.rs is 2104 lines — both approaching split threshold
CLAUDE.md test count estimate is 4x stale — claims ~190 lib tests but cargo test --lib shows 778 passed (818 #[test] annotations in src/). Update CLAUDE.md comments.
Seed 42 dies at tick ~6668 in playtest (pop=4 at tick 6000 is Fragile and does not survive to 12K ticks); food or housing insufficient for long-term viability at this seed

Seed 42 has been exactly pop=4 food=12 for 25 consecutive health checks (diagnostic runs) — auto-build never places second Hut in diagnostic run; BUT seed 42 showed pop=6 in the 2026-04-28 baseline run, confirming the second Hut IS placed when rand::rng() is favorable. Root cause is rand::rng() non-determinism in game/build.rs auto-build scoring, not a logic error.

Auto-build output itself is non-deterministic: seed 777 produces 1 Hut (pop=4, cap=4) in one run and 3 Huts (pop=11, cap=12) in the next sequential run with same binary and seed. rand::rng() affects building placement order, not just breeding/death.

Prey (rabbits) extinct in 2/3 evaluation seeds by tick 6000: seed 42 rabbits=0, seed 137 rabbits=0, seed 777 rabbits=10 (2026-04-29 diagnostics). game/mod.rs:878 notes prey are required for breeding system. Prey extinction may cause wolves to target villagers exclusively, elevating threat scores (seeds 137/777 show threat_score ~22-27 vs seed 42's 10.68). Root cause unknown — possible predator saturation or spawn density too low.

Within-session auto-build divergence confirmed 2026-05-06: seed 137 diagnostics run (1st) placed 3 Huts (capacity=12); report-card run (2nd, sequential, same binary) placed 6 Huts (capacity=24). Seed 777: diagnostics=5 Huts vs report-card=3 Huts. rand::rng() in game/build.rs produces ±2-3 Hut variance per run, making housing capacity highly non-deterministic.

Wood skill frozen: skills.wood=0.5487951708942683 identical to 16 decimal places across all 3 evaluation seeds (42, 137, 777) in 2026-05-07 diagnostics. Farm skill varies correctly (2.77, 18.82, 25.05 per seed). Wood-gathering skill either not updated in ecs/systems.rs when wood is gathered, or not wired to any activity. Diagnose skill update path before skill-related changes.

Wood skill pure-decay confirmed 2026-05-12: wood_skill=0.5488=1.0*(0.9999^6000) in all 3 seeds, proving woodcutting_ticks=0 across entire 6000-tick evaluation window. Root cause: Forest biome coverage near 0% (0.1-0.6% in all seeds), no trees available to cut. skill.woodcutting update path verified correct (systems.rs:639, game/mod.rs:1801) — code is correct, the issue is terrain/biome imbalance. Check #41 added to validate_features.sh to detect this pattern.

game_loop.description: Game struct, step(), input handling, water cycle, fire, particles
known_issues: game/mod.rs is 2592 lines — grew by ~200 lines with Stage 4 of 0D refactor (WorldState integration). File split was done (input, water_cycle, fire, particles extracted) but mod.rs remains large
fire.rs, water_cycle.rs, particles.rs have 0 tests each

construction_dust_particles_spawn (tests.rs:2840) is a flaky test — 1/4 probability particle spawn over 20 ticks gives ~0.3% false-failure rate; needs more ticks or deterministic seed. HIT on 2026-04-13 and 2026-04-15. Should be #[ignore]d.

build_site_gets_completed_in_game (tests.rs:252) is a new flaky test discovered 2026-05-05 — fails in full suite (777 passed, 1 failed) but passes in isolation. Root cause: rand::rng() in ecs/systems.rs and game/mod.rs makes villager behavior non-deterministic, so some runs don't complete the build site within 3000 ticks. Same mechanism as construction_dust_particles_spawn. Should be #[ignore]d or fixed with seeded RNG.

Simulation metrics (avg_moisture, avg_vegetation, pipe_water_total, wind_moisture_total) are nested under "terrain" key in collect_diagnostics() output, not a "simulation" key — non-obvious grouping for external consumers (game/mod.rs:2445)

12 compiler warnings in game/mod.rs: unused_mut (line 1220), tick_config assigned-but-never-read (lines 2135-2147 — dead event modifier chain), unused variable n, constant DIRECTIONS never used, unused methods. First counted 2026-05-01.

Flaky test confirmed 2026-05-12: cargo test --lib run 2 produced 777 passed/1 failed/10 ignored (run 1: 778/0/10). Known flaky tests (construction_dust_particles_spawn, build_site_gets_completed_in_game) still not marked #[ignore].

building_system.description: Auto-build, building placement, demolish, outposts, influence, traffic
building_system.test_note: Tests live in src/game/tests.rs, counted under game_loop
known_issues: game/build.rs is 2306 lines — approaching split threshold

events.description: Random events: drought, harvest, migration, wolf surge, milestones, threat scaling
known_issues: Drought event structurally impossible at 12K ticks: grain>=pop*5 threshold never met in evaluation runs (Summer just starts at tick 12K)

WolfSurge is non-deterministic: seed 777 fired WolfSurge in 2026-05-02 run (wolves=2), 0/3 seeds fired on 2026-05-01. Seed 42 threat_score=10.68 (low). Event firing depends on rand::rng() path in events.rs — non-reproducible across same-seed runs. Seed 137 fired WolfSurge in 2026-05-11 diagnostics run (first event since 2026-05-02 seed 777 run).
Road auto-build (ROAD_TRAFFIC_THRESHOLD=300.0) never triggers in evaluation window — 0% Road coverage at tick 6000 across all 3 seeds. Threshold too high for small populations (4-11 villagers).

0/3 evaluation seeds produced any events at tick 6000 — 25 consecutive zero-event health checks as of 2026-05-06. Events cannot fire effectively while tick_config modifier chain is broken (see CRITICAL note below).

CRITICAL: tick_config event modifier chain is broken — game/mod.rs:2135-2148 builds tick_config with drought (rain_rate*=0.4) and harvest (rain_rate*=1.5) modifiers but step_water_cycle() signature is (bool, f64) and never receives tick_config; modifiers are silently discarded. Drought/harvest have zero effect on simulation. First identified 2026-05-01.

rendering.description: Terminal rendering: 4 modes (Normal, Map, Landscape, Debug) + overlays
known_issues: Three color truth sources (Terrain::fg/bg, SoilType::ground_fg, vegetation_color_from_conditions) — should be unified
features.json test_count was 62; actual count is 61 (all in render/mod.rs)
render/mod.rs is still 1300 lines after split; render/shared.rs is 865 lines

save_load.description: JSON save/load for game state + ECS world serialization
known_issues: No dedicated unit tests — only implicit coverage via integration tests
Not fully implemented or tested
src/scripting/mod.rs not documented in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — directory not in file map (check #38 added 2026-05-08)

hydrology.description: Particle-based hydraulic erosion (SimpleHydrology port from Nick McDonald)
known_issues: Not referenced in ARCHITECTURE.md file map
Integration with terrain_pipeline unclear — standalone research module

world_state.description: WorldState struct — canonical simulation state (heights, water, moisture, vegetation, wind). Introduced in 0D architecture refactor Stages 1-4.
known_issues: Not documented in ARCHITECTURE.md or design docs
WaterMap still coexists in Game struct — WorldState.water (PipeWater) should eventually be the only water source
No unit tests — all coverage is indirect through integration tests
State-driven architecture design doc (docs/design/cross_cutting/state_driven_architecture.md) describes the intent but implementation is not complete

status_legend.needs_refactor: Working but code structure needs improvement
